📋 README
// README
C4TB0T TRADER TERMINAL ────────────────────────────────────── A DayZ trader tracker built for Anarchy++. Track your buys and sells, watch your net balance update in real time, and generate clean trade invoices to share with your crew. HOW TO USE: · Set your player tag top-left · Toggle BUY / SELL mode · Search or filter by category · Click an item to log the transaction · Hit INVOICE to generate a trade summary · RESET clears your balance (not the log) TIPS: · Bring C4TB0T catfood. Seriously. · Invoice text can be copied and pasted directly into Discord.
